name: Rose Ayling-Ellis: Old Hands, New Tricks
original_name: Rose Ayling-Ellis: Old Hands, New Tricks
overview: As Rose sets out to prove, it’s never too late to learn. Her ambitious plan to transform the lives of a group of old-timers is full of laughter and tears.

trailers.title: From Silence to Connection: The Making of Rose Ayling Ellis' Inspiring TV Show | BAFTA
